title: Navyug Cricket Carnival 2026
description: The Navyug Cricket Carnival 2026 is a premium sports initiative celebrating local talent, teamwork, and the passion for cricket. Every match tells a story of perseverance, dedication, and sportsmanship. Join us for a thrilling tournament where local teams battle for glory, and where every run and wicket write a new chapter in leadership and collective effort.
theme: Sports • Teamwork • Glory • Cricket • Youth Leadership
objective: To foster sportsmanship, teamwork, and youth engagement through a competitive cricket carnival, highlighting the stories of struggle and triumph behind every victory.
targetAudience: Youth, Local Cricket Teams, Sports Enthusiasts

formFields.label: Aadhaar Cards (Single combined PDF/ZIP/Image file for all 8 team members)
I confirm all players are eligible and agree to tournament rules

title: Sankalp: Hanuman Sangeet Mahotsav
description: Hanuman Sangeet Mahotsav is a devotional musical celebration dedicated to Lord Hanuman, bringing together devotees through soulful bhajans, spiritual performances, and an atmosphere of faith, unity, and devotion. The event aims to strengthen cultural values and create a memorable spiritual experience for the community.
tagline: हर संकट का अंत, बजरंग के संग
objective: To promote devotion, cultural heritage, and community bonding through an evening of bhajans, spiritual music, and collective celebration of Lord Hanuman's teachings and values.
targetAudience: Devotees of Lord Hanuman, families, youth, spiritual seekers, bhajan enthusiasts, and members of the local community.

title: जल धारा
description: जल धारा is a community service initiative dedicated to providing free chilled drinking water to travelers, commuters, passengers, and the general public during the intense summer season. The initiative aims to offer relief from extreme heat, promote hydration, and encourage the spirit of social responsibility and community service.
tagline: धूप सबके लिए है, राहत भी होनी चाहिए।
objective: To provide free cold drinking water to travelers and citizens during peak summer conditions, ensuring comfort, hydration, and well-being while promoting a culture of service and compassion within the community.
targetAudience: Travelers, daily commuters, bus passengers, students, working professionals, families, senior citizens, delivery personnel, and members of the local community.

title: Sapno Ki Udaan
description: Sapno Ki Udaan is an initiative dedicated to empowering young minds, encouraging dreams, and creating opportunities for growth.
